While it used to hold a $299 MSRP, it’s been starting lower at $239 since May, when the brand permanently cut prices across its lineup to better match market rates. We’ve mostly seen discounts dropping the cost to this rate both before and after May’s price cuts, though there were slight dips lower to $204 in January and $199 during last month’s Prime Day event. If you missed your chance last month, you’re getting the next-best rate we have tracked since May’s price cuts. Be sure to also check out the Bluetti Summer Power Sale lineup of exclusive deals while it lasts for only a few more days.

Zac Bowden / Windows Central:
Microsoft announces a Windows 11 search overhaul that prioritizes local results, removes promotional web content, and more, rolling out to Windows Insiders  —  Windows 11's search user experience is getting a big update, with Microsoft moving to prioritize local results, remove promotional content, and much more.

items.title: Solution to Feynman's reverse sprinkler puzzle also applies to "silly sprinklers"
items.summary: New study confirms 2024 "momentum flux theory" on how angular momentum of water flows drives rotation.

items.title: Nomad’s giant sitewide Anniversary sale now live: Rare deals on MagSafe chargers, cases, Watch bands, more
items.summary: Nomad has just launched one of its biggest sales events of the year, with deals spanning its range of iPhone 17 leather cases, Apple Watch bands, cables, Find My Tracking Card (we were told this was going on sale today, but it is yet to go live), its gorgeous Stand One Max 3-in-1 25W MagSafe Charger, wallets, and more. Alongside all of the deals in its Overstock Sale section, you’re looking at up to 30% off some of its latest-generation gear and a host of rare price drops here on the official site.

items.title: US judge voids Donald Trump's $1.8bn settlement with IRS that gave him immunity from tax audits
items.summary: The judge said the suit was brought for 'improper purposes' and referred a Trump attorney for possible disciplinary action.

items.title: Stop putting your apps on layaway with 78% off Microsoft Office Pro Plus at $55 ($250 value)
items.summary: TL;DR: Consolidate your office suite with a Lifetime License Microsoft Office 2024 Professional Plus for just $54.99 (Reg. $249.99).

items.title: States make last-ditch effort to stop the Paramount ‘media behemoth’
items.summary: A dozen state attorneys general are trying to block the $110 billion merger of Paramount and Warner Bros Discovery they warn would raise movie prices and crush cable TV distributors. The states - California, Arizona, Colorado, Connecticut, Massachusetts, Minnesota, Nevada, New Jersey, New Mexico, New York, Oregon, and Washington - filed suit on Monday, arguing […]

items.title: States sue to block Paramount/WBD merger that was approved by Trump admin
items.summary: AG: Deal will bring "higher prices, lower quality, and less content for film and TV."

items.title: The wildest allegations in Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI
items.summary: Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI contains allegations that range from employees joking about unauthorized access to Apple’s systems to claims that job candidates were asked to bring Apple hardware to interviews. Here are the complaint’s most eye-catching claims.

items.title: Go quick! Official Nintendo Switch 2 Camera now just $10 at GameStop (Reg. $55)
items.summary:
Update 6/12: While the Amazon deal below is still live when added to your cart, GameStop just dropped the price on the official Nintendo Switch 2 Camera down to a crazy $9.99 – this likely won’t last for long. 

The official Nintendo Switch 2 Camera is now sitting down at a rare Amazon all-time low with over 42% in savings.

items.title: Save $526 today on Samsung’s Odyssey 27-inch 4K 240Hz QD-OLED gaming monitor while it’s down to $774 all-time low
items.summary: As part of its wider sale on monitors, Woot is now offering Samsung’s 2025 27-inch Odyssey OLED G8 (G81SF) 4K 240Hz gaming monitor for $773.99 Prime shipped. This is regularly a $1,300 display, which is currently fetching $850 at Amazon. Today’s offer at Woot, however, takes an additional $76 off. This 40% discount marks the lowest price we have tracked for this 4K UHD monitor, landing $26 below its previous all-time low.

items.title: Q&A with Xinzhou Wu, head of automotive at Nvidia, on Nvidia's chips and AI models for autonomous driving, lidar's usefulness for Level 4 autonomy, and more (Nilay Patel/The Verge)
items.summary:
Nilay Patel / The Verge:
Q&A with Xinzhou Wu, head of automotive at Nvidia, on Nvidia's chips and AI models for autonomous driving, lidar's usefulness for Level 4 autonomy, and more  —  Xinzhou Wu on autonomy, Chinese cars, and if we really need lidar  —  Today, I'm talking with Xinzhou Wu, who is the head of automotive at Nvidia.

items.title: Rare deal delivers Amazon all-time low pricing on Belkin’s 25W UltraCharge Pro 3-in-1 MagSafe stand
items.summary: Belkin’s UltraCharge lineup of 25W MagSafe chargers is easily on my short list of the best in the price range, and especially this 3-in-1 model with active cooling that is actually whisper quiet. This one, unfortunately, has not gone on sale very much at all, but you can land the black model at the Amazon all-time low right now.

items.summary: Malcolm Timbrell's wife and their friends are thought to have died when a devastating wildfire tore through their village in Spain.

items.title: Sam Altman’s space data center trash talk is what most experts already believe
items.summary: Responding to Musk accusing him of being a scammer, Altman said, "homeboy you're the one sellling [sic] public market investors on short-term space datacenters."

items.summary: The biggest smartphone makers keep on trucking in the face of component shortages and economic uncertainty.

items.title: ASUS X KOJIMA PRODUCTIONS gaming gear sees first discounts from $55 (Up to $70 off)
items.summary: ASUS teamed up with KOJIMA PRODUCTIONS to debut a range of themed accessories earlier this year, and Best Buy is now offering the first deals on them from $54.99 shipped. The ROG Scabbard II XXL mouse pad can be had for $54.99 shipped right now, down from $70, while the Keris II Origin wireless mouse has dropped to $129.99 shipped from $170. The Delta II wireless headset is also seeing a sizable $70 discount, bringing it down to $199.99 shipped from $270. ASUS also launched a matching ROG Flow Z13-KJP gaming laptop as part of the collection, but that model is currently out of stock and is not included in today’s sale. The rest of the collection can be had for $385 right now, so be sure to snag them after getting more details below.

items.title: Monday Android app deals and freebies: Turnip Boy Robs a Bank, Beholder Conductor, Serial Cleaner, more
items.summary: Your afternoon lineup of the best Android game and app deals is now ready to roll, including titles like Turnip Boy Robs a Bank, Beholder: Conductor, Serial Cleaner, Parabellum: Siege of Legends, Foretales, Looking for Aliens, Townopolis, and more. Alongside the apps, we are tracking some major Google tech deals this week including $200 off the base model 10, $300 off select 10 Pro, and $250 off the 10 Pro XL, as well as Google Pixel Watch 4 at $100 off, Google Pixel 10/Pro Pixelsnap cases and price drops on Nothing’s 2026 Headphone (a). The Google Play deals await below.

items.title: Zelda Ocarina of Time remake leak roundup: Everything we know so far, release date, price, more
items.summary: Nintendo’s big Switch 2 release of the year, The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake, has been officially revealed, but very little is known about it. Nintendo did mistakenly drop a brief description, and it has told us it is coming this year, but what is The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake release date? How much is it going to cost? And what sort of remake are we going to get?

Buy for $31 (Reg. $38)

What we love

items.title: SpaceX cleared to fly Starship again after booster failure in May
items.summary: This will be the first Starship test flight for SpaceX as a public company, testing the market's appetite for the company's "fly, fail, fix" approach to rocket development, which often ends in fireballs.
